title: Obscene publication and exhibition relating to children
sub_category: child sexual images and obscene exhibition
legal_text_summary_en: Covers using, employing, persuading, inducing, or coercing a child to appear in obscene or indecent shows, photographs, or films, and distributing, publishing, possessing, or advertising such material.
simple_explanation_en: This section applies when a child is used in obscene or indecent photos, videos, shows, or related publications.
punishment_summary: Imprisonment of either description for 2 to 10 years and may also be punished with fine. A photo or film developer who fails to report discovered indecent child material may face imprisonment up to 2 years or fine or both.
reporting_guidance: If child sexual images or recordings are involved, report immediately to police and child protection authorities.

title: Duty of person providing service by computer to prevent sexual abuse of a child
legal_text_summary_en: A person providing a computer-based service must take necessary steps to ensure that the service is not used for acts relating to the sexual abuse of a child, and if aware of such use must inform the nearest police station.
simple_explanation_en: This section is about online platforms or computer services being used for child sexual abuse. If the provider knows about it, they must report it.
punishment_summary: Imprisonment of either description up to 2 years or fine or both.
reporting_guidance: Where computer systems or online platforms are involved, preserve evidence and report to police without delay.

title: Duty to inform of use of premises for child abuse
legal_text_summary_en: Any person who has charge, care, control, or possession of premises and knows the premises are being used for child abuse must inform the officer in charge of the nearest police station.
simple_explanation_en: If someone knows that a house, room, building, or other place is being used to abuse a child, that person must report it.
punishment_summary: Imprisonment of either description up to 2 years or fine or both.
reporting_guidance: Urgent reporting is required where abuse is happening at a known location.

title: Causing or procuring children to beg
legal_text_summary_en: Covers causing or procuring a child to be in a street, premises, or place for begging, receiving alms, or inducing people to give alms.
simple_explanation_en: This section applies when a child is used for begging or for collecting money from the public.
punishment_summary: Imprisonment of either description up to 5 years and may also be liable to fine.
reporting_guidance: Report to police or child protection authorities if a child is being used for begging.

title: Hiring or employing children to act as procurers
legal_text_summary_en: Covers knowingly hiring, employing, persuading, using, inducing, or coercing a child to procure any person for illicit sexual intercourse.
simple_explanation_en: This section applies when a child is used to arrange or help sexual exploitation.
punishment_summary: Imprisonment of either description for 2 to 5 years and may also be liable to fine.
reporting_guidance: Treat as urgent child sexual exploitation and report immediately.

title: Hiring or employing children to traffic in restricted articles
legal_text_summary_en: Covers knowingly hiring, employing, persuading, using, inducing, or coercing a child to traffic in restricted articles. Trafficking includes selling, giving, procuring, storing, administering, transporting, sending, delivering, or distributing.
simple_explanation_en: This section applies when a child is used to move, sell, store, or distribute restricted items such as dangerous drugs.
punishment_summary: Imprisonment of either description for 5 to 7 years and may also be liable to fine.
reporting_guidance: Report to police and child protection authorities where a child is being used in drug or restricted-item activity.

title: Exposure and abandonment of a child under twelve years
legal_text_summary_en: A parent or person having care of a child under twelve who exposes or leaves the child in any place with the intention of wholly abandoning the child commits this offence.
simple_explanation_en: This section applies when a child under twelve is deliberately abandoned.
punishment_summary: Imprisonment of either description up to 7 years, or fine, or both.
reporting_guidance: If a child has been abandoned or left without care, act immediately for safety and inform police or NCPA.

title: Cruelty to children
legal_text_summary_en: A person having custody, charge, or care of anyone under eighteen commits this offence by willfully assaulting, ill-treating, neglecting, or abandoning the child in a way likely to cause suffering or injury to health, including mental derangement.
simple_explanation_en: This section applies when a child is physically abused, badly treated, neglected, or abandoned by someone responsible for the child.
punishment_summary: Imprisonment of either description for 2 to 10 years and may also be punished with fine and compensation.
reporting_guidance: This is a core section for child abuse reporting and legal guidance.

title: Concealment of birth by secret disposal of dead body
legal_text_summary_en: Covers intentionally concealing or attempting to conceal the birth of a child by secretly burying or otherwise disposing of the dead body of the child.
simple_explanation_en: This section applies when someone secretly disposes of a dead child’s body to hide the birth.
punishment_summary: Imprisonment of either description up to 2 years, or fine, or both.
reporting_guidance: Treat as a serious matter and report to police immediately.

title: Cause hurt
legal_text_summary_en: Defines hurt as causing bodily pain, disease, or infirmity to any person.
simple_explanation_en: This section defines what counts as hurt in law.
reporting_guidance: Use together with sections on voluntarily causing hurt and grievous hurt.

title: Grievous hurt
legal_text_summary_en: Defines grievous hurt to include serious injuries such as permanent loss or impairment of sight or hearing, loss or impairment of a limb or joint, permanent disfigurement, fractures, life-endangering injuries, and injuries causing severe pain or inability to follow ordinary pursuits for twenty days.
simple_explanation_en: This section defines serious physical injuries that the law treats as grievous hurt.
reporting_guidance: Use when the child has suffered serious or lasting injury.

title: Voluntarily causing hurt
legal_text_summary_en: A person voluntarily causes hurt if they act intending or knowing that they are likely to cause hurt, and hurt is caused.
simple_explanation_en: This section explains what it means to intentionally cause hurt.
reporting_guidance: Use with section 314 for punishment.

title: Voluntarily causing grievous hurt
legal_text_summary_en: A person voluntarily causes grievous hurt if they intend or know themselves likely to cause grievous hurt and grievous hurt is caused.
simple_explanation_en: This section explains what it means to intentionally cause serious injury.
reporting_guidance: Use with sections 316 and 317 for punishment.

title: Punishment for voluntarily causing hurt
legal_text_summary_en: Provides punishment for voluntarily causing hurt.
simple_explanation_en: This section gives the punishment for intentionally causing hurt.
punishment_summary: Imprisonment of either description up to 1 year, or fine up to 1000 rupees, or both.
reporting_guidance: Relevant where physical harm is present but not grievous hurt.

title: Voluntarily causing hurt by dangerous weapons or means
legal_text_summary_en: Applies where hurt is caused using dangerous instruments, fire, heated substances, poison, corrosive substances, explosives, harmful substances, or animals.
simple_explanation_en: This section applies when hurt is caused using a weapon, poison, fire, or another dangerous method.
punishment_summary: Imprisonment of either description up to 3 years, or fine, or both.
reporting_guidance: Use when injury was caused by a dangerous method or instrument.

title: Punishment for voluntarily causing grievous hurt
legal_text_summary_en: Provides punishment for voluntarily causing grievous hurt.
simple_explanation_en: This section gives the punishment for intentionally causing serious injury.
punishment_summary: Imprisonment of either description up to 7 years and fine. If the injured person is a woman or child, whipping may additionally be imposed under the text.
reporting_guidance: Relevant where there is severe injury to a child.

title: Voluntarily causing grievous hurt by dangerous weapons or means
legal_text_summary_en: Applies where grievous hurt is caused by dangerous instruments, fire, heated substances, poison, corrosive substances, explosives, harmful substances, or animals.
simple_explanation_en: This section applies when serious injury is caused using a weapon, poison, fire, or another dangerous method.
punishment_summary: Imprisonment of either description up to 10 years and fine. If the injured person is a woman or child, whipping may additionally be imposed under the text.
reporting_guidance: Highly relevant for severe child abuse with dangerous methods.

title: Voluntarily causing hurt to extort property or constrain to an illegal act
legal_text_summary_en: Applies where hurt is caused to extort property or valuable security, or to constrain the victim or a person interested in the victim to do anything illegal or facilitating an offence.
simple_explanation_en: This section applies when someone is hurt in order to force money, property, or illegal action.
punishment_summary: Imprisonment of either description up to 10 years and fine.
reporting_guidance: Relevant where abuse is used for pressure, threats, or forced compliance.

title: Sexual harassment
legal_text_summary_en: Covers sexual harassment by assault or criminal force, or by words or actions causing sexual annoyance or harassment. Includes unwelcome sexual advances by a person in authority.
simple_explanation_en: This section applies when a person sexually harasses another through physical acts, words, or behaviour.
punishment_summary: Imprisonment of either description up to 5 years or fine or both, and compensation may be ordered.
reporting_guidance: Use for non-rape sexual harassment, including abuse of authority.

title: Kidnapping
legal_text_summary_en: Defines kidnapping as either kidnapping from Sri Lanka or kidnapping from lawful guardianship.
simple_explanation_en: This section introduces the two legal forms of kidnapping.
reporting_guidance: Use with sections 351 to 358A.

title: Kidnapping from Sri Lanka
legal_text_summary_en: A person kidnaps another from Sri Lanka by conveying them beyond the limits of Sri Lanka without valid consent.
simple_explanation_en: This section applies when a person is taken out of Sri Lanka without proper consent.
punishment_summary: Punishment is provided under section 354.
reporting_guidance: Relevant where removal or attempted removal from the country is involved.

title: Kidnapping from lawful guardianship
legal_text_summary_en: A person kidnaps from lawful guardianship by taking or enticing a minor under fourteen if male or under sixteen if female, or a person of unsound mind, out of the keeping of the lawful guardian without consent.
simple_explanation_en: This section applies when a child is taken away from the lawful guardian without permission.
punishment_summary: Punishment is provided under section 354.
reporting_guidance: Core section for child kidnapping cases involving guardians.

title: Abduction
legal_text_summary_en: Defines abduction as compelling a person by force, deceit, abuse of authority, or other means of compulsion to go from any place.
simple_explanation_en: This section explains what counts as abduction.
punishment_summary: Punishment depends on the connected offence sections such as 355 to 358.
reporting_guidance: Use where force or deception was used to move a person.

title: Punishment for kidnapping
legal_text_summary_en: Provides punishment for kidnapping from Sri Lanka or from lawful guardianship.
simple_explanation_en: This section gives the punishment for kidnapping.
punishment_summary: Imprisonment of either description up to 7 years and fine.
reporting_guidance: Use when kidnapping elements are already identified under sections 351 or 352.

title: Kidnapping or abducting in order to murder
legal_text_summary_en: Applies where kidnapping or abduction is done so that the person may be murdered or placed in danger of being murdered.
simple_explanation_en: This section applies when a person is kidnapped or abducted to be killed or put in danger of being killed.
punishment_summary: Rigorous imprisonment up to 20 years and fine.
reporting_guidance: Treat as extreme risk and emergency.

title: Kidnapping or abducting with intent secretly and wrongfully to confine a person
legal_text_summary_en: Applies where a person is kidnapped or abducted with intent to cause that person to be secretly and wrongfully confined.
simple_explanation_en: This section applies when someone is taken away to be hidden or illegally confined.
punishment_summary: Imprisonment of either description up to 7 years and fine.
reporting_guidance: Use where the victim is hidden, locked in, or unlawfully restrained.

title: Kidnapping or abducting a woman to compel marriage or illicit intercourse
legal_text_summary_en: Applies where a woman is kidnapped or abducted to compel marriage against her will or to force or seduce her into illicit intercourse.
simple_explanation_en: This section applies when a woman is taken away to force marriage or sexual exploitation.
punishment_summary: Imprisonment of either description up to 10 years and fine.
reporting_guidance: Relevant in child marriage or forced sexual exploitation situations where the victim is female.

title: Kidnapping or abducting in order to subject a person to grievous hurt, slavery, or unnatural lust
legal_text_summary_en: Applies where a person is kidnapped or abducted in order to subject that person to grievous hurt, slavery, unnatural lust, or danger of being so subjected.
simple_explanation_en: This section applies when someone is taken away to be seriously harmed, enslaved, or sexually exploited.
punishment_summary: Imprisonment of either description up to 10 years and fine.
reporting_guidance: Highly relevant where abduction is linked with sexual abuse, forced control, or serious violence.

title: Debt bondage, serfdom, forced or compulsory labour, slavery and recruitment of children for use in armed conflict
legal_text_summary_en: Covers subjecting a person to debt bondage, serfdom, forced or compulsory labour, slavery, or recruiting a child for use in armed conflict.
simple_explanation_en: This section applies when a person, especially a child, is forced into labour, slavery, bondage, or armed conflict.
punishment_summary: For debt bondage, forced labour, or slavery: imprisonment up to 20 years and fine. If committed in relation to a child, or where a child is recruited for armed conflict: imprisonment up to 30 years and fine.
reporting_guidance: Treat as severe exploitation and urgent child protection risk.

title: Procuration
sub_category: procuring for prostitution or sexual abuse
legal_text_summary_en: Covers procuring or attempting to procure any person to become a prostitute, leave Sri Lanka for illicit sexual intercourse, enter or frequent a brothel, or be detained in premises for illicit sexual intercourse or sexual abuse.
simple_explanation_en: This section applies when a person is recruited, moved, or kept for prostitution or sexual abuse.
punishment_summary: Imprisonment of either description for 2 to 10 years and may also be punished with fine.
reporting_guidance: Relevant for organized sexual exploitation or movement of victims for sexual purposes.

title: Sexual exploitation of children
legal_text_summary_en: Covers permitting a child to remain in premises for sexual abuse, acting as a procurer of a child, inducing a person to become a client of a child, using influence or violence to procure a child, or giving money or goods to procure a child for sexual intercourse or sexual abuse.
simple_explanation_en: This section applies when a child is sexually exploited, offered, or arranged for abuse.
punishment_summary: Imprisonment of either description for 5 to 20 years and may also be punished with fine.
reporting_guidance: Core section for commercial or arranged sexual exploitation of children.

title: Trafficking
legal_text_summary_en: Covers buying, selling, bartering, recruiting, transporting, transferring, harbouring, or receiving a person through threat, force, fraud, deception, inducement, or vulnerability for forced labour, slavery, servitude, organ removal, prostitution, sexual exploitation, or another offence. For children, consent is irrelevant for the listed exploitative purposes.
simple_explanation_en: This section applies when a person, especially a child, is moved, sold, hidden, or controlled for exploitation.
punishment_summary: Imprisonment of either description for 2 to 20 years and may also be punished with fine. Where committed in respect of a child: imprisonment for 3 to 20 years and may also be punished with fine.
reporting_guidance: Treat as a major child protection and criminal exploitation offence.

title: Offences related to adoption
legal_text_summary_en: Covers taking or assisting a child to travel abroad for adoption without lawful consent, obtaining consent of a pregnant woman for money, recruiting women or couples to bear children, falsifying birth records, procuring children from institutions for money or through intimidation, and impersonating the mother.
simple_explanation_en: This section applies when adoption-related processes are abused through money, intimidation, record falsification, or unlawful movement of a child.
reporting_guidance: Relevant where child transfer or adoption appears fraudulent, coercive, or unlawful.
note: Acts were confirmed from the retrieved text, but the punishment wording was not fully visible in the snippet used here.

title: Soliciting a child
legal_text_summary_en: Covers soliciting, by any means, a person under eighteen or a person believed to be under eighteen for the purpose of sexual abuse of a child.
simple_explanation_en: This section applies when someone contacts, approaches, or tries to lure a child for sexual abuse.
punishment_summary: Imprisonment of either description up to 10 years or fine or both.
reporting_guidance: Relevant for grooming or luring behaviour, including remote or cross-border contact.

title: Rape
legal_text_summary_en: Defines rape to include sexual intercourse without consent, with consent obtained through force, intimidation, detention, fear, unsoundness of mind, intoxication, mistaken identity as husband, or where the woman is under sixteen years of age, subject to the marital exception stated in the section.
simple_explanation_en: This section defines when sexual intercourse becomes rape under the law.
punishment_summary: Punishment is provided under section 364.
reporting_guidance: Use for defining rape conditions before applying punishment section 364.

title: Punishment for rape
legal_text_summary_en: Provides punishment for rape, with higher punishment for aggravated circumstances such as abuse by public officers or institutional staff, rape of pregnant women, women under eighteen, disabled women, and gang rape. A further enhancement exists where the woman is under sixteen and stands in the prohibited degree of relationship in section 364A.
simple_explanation_en: This section gives the punishment for rape and increases it in more serious situations.
punishment_summary: General: rigorous imprisonment for 7 to 20 years and fine, plus compensation. Aggravated cases: rigorous imprisonment for 10 to 20 years and fine, plus compensation. Where rape is committed on a woman under sixteen who stands in the prohibited degree under section 364A: rigorous imprisonment for 15 to 20 years and fine.
reporting_guidance: Use with section 363 for rape cases.

title: Incest
legal_text_summary_en: Covers sexual intercourse between persons who stand in prohibited family relationships listed in the section, including direct descendants, adoptive relations, siblings, nieces, descendants, and certain step or widow relationships.
simple_explanation_en: This section applies when sexual intercourse happens within close prohibited family relationships.
punishment_summary: For incest: rigorous imprisonment for 7 to 20 years and fine. Attempt: imprisonment of either description up to 2 years. Prosecution requires written sanction of the Attorney General.
reporting_guidance: Relevant when abuse involves a close family relationship.

title: Unnatural offence
legal_text_summary_en: Covers carnal intercourse against the order of nature with a man, woman, or animal. Where committed by a person over eighteen in respect of a person under sixteen, the punishment is enhanced.
simple_explanation_en: This section applies to acts the law classifies as unnatural offences, with stricter punishment when a child under sixteen is involved.
punishment_summary: Imprisonment of either description up to 10 years and fine. If committed by a person over eighteen against a person under sixteen: rigorous imprisonment for 10 to 20 years and fine, plus compensation.
reporting_guidance: Relevant where sexual abuse of a child falls under this section.

title: Acts of gross indecency between persons
legal_text_summary_en: Covers committing, participating in, procuring, or attempting to procure any act of gross indecency with another person, in public or private. Where committed by a person over eighteen against a person under sixteen, punishment is enhanced.
simple_explanation_en: This section applies to acts of gross indecency, including child victims.
punishment_summary: Imprisonment of either description up to 2 years or fine or both. If committed by a person over eighteen against a person under sixteen: rigorous imprisonment for 10 to 20 years and fine, plus compensation.
reporting_guidance: Use where conduct is sexual and serious but not charged as rape or grave sexual abuse.

title: Grave sexual abuse
legal_text_summary_en: Covers sexual acts done for sexual gratification using genitals, another body part, or an instrument on any orifice or part of another person's body, where the act does not amount to rape but occurs without consent, or where the person is under sixteen, detained, threatened, intimidated, of unsound mind, or intoxicated.
simple_explanation_en: This section applies to serious sexual abuse that may not legally fall under rape but is still a grave offence.
punishment_summary: General: rigorous imprisonment for 5 to 20 years and fine, plus compensation. If committed on a person under eighteen: rigorous imprisonment for 7 to 20 years and fine, plus compensation.
reporting_guidance: Core section for severe child sexual abuse cases.

title: Publication of matter relating to certain offences
legal_text_summary_en: Prohibits printing or publishing the name or identifying matter of a victim in offences under sections 345, 360A, 360B, 363, 364A, 365, 365A, or 365B, subject to limited exceptions such as police investigation or written authorization.
simple_explanation_en: This section protects the identity of victims in serious sexual offences and related offences.
punishment_summary: Imprisonment of either description up to 2 years or fine or both.
reporting_guidance: Do not reveal the victim’s identity in system outputs unless legally authorized.
